_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Conduct quality control in order to determine validity and relevance of information gathered about networks.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data quality dimensions (accuracy, completeness, consistency, timeliness, uniqueness, validity, integrity) and the measurement approaches applicable to each dimension.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-021 (DQ, cosine: 0.463), DQ-K-005 (DQ, cosine: 0.460).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.479). Shared vocabulary: [quality, validity]. DCWF-only terms [conduct, control, determine, gathered, information, networks] vs WIDAI-only terms [accuracy, applicable, approaches, completeness, consistency, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.892, R=0.843). P exceeds R by 0.049 — the DCWF element's 15 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Conduct quality control in order to determine validity and relevance of informat" and "Knowledge of data quality dimensions (accuracy, completeness, consistency, timel" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.487 ≈ STS 0.479 (gap 0.008). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [quality, validity] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.7%. Shared tokens: [quality, validity]. DCWF-only: [conduct, control, determine, gathered, information, networks]. WIDAI-only: [accuracy, applicable, approaches, completeness, consistency, data].
